name: Last Bite Hotel
overview: Eight of the most talented chefs in the country receive a mysterious invitation to stay and cook at a spooky, isolated hotel. In the end, only the most talented, strategic and resourceful chef will end their stay at the hotel $25,000 richer

trailers.title: SERIES PREMIERE: Last Bite Hotel with Tituss Burgess | 10-Minute Sneak Peek | Food Network
